MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is granted, no opposition filed. Judgment to be entered in plaintiff's favor. Prevailing party to submit proposed forms of order and judgment. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Attorney Fees; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED.
PPLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion for Facts and Documents Deemed Admitted and for Attorney Fees is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Request for Sanctions pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2033.280(2)(c) is GRANTED in the amount of $430. Prevailing party to submit order. Judge Monica F. Wiley. Not reported.
